## Entities.JournalLibrary.addJournal() method

Adds a [journal entry](./ts-chocolate.entities.journal.anyjournalentry.md) to the library. Accepts filling and confection journal entries (both edit and production types).

**Signature:**

```typescript
addJournal(journal: AnyJournalEntry): Result<JournalId>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

journal


</td><td>

AnyJournalEntry


</td><td>

The journal entry to add (validated)


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Result&lt;[JournalId](./ts-chocolate.journalid.md)<!-- -->&gt;

`Success` with the JournalId, or `Failure` if journal already exists or invalid
